title: Add Zairok AI Discovery App to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Zairok joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: The community garden grows again. Zairok AI Discovery App just landed in the showcase—a neat little hub for finding AI tools and models.
gist.summary: Added the Zairok AI Discovery App to the community showcase and greenhouse directory.
gist.impact: Users can now find Zairok in our app directory, providing a new community-built hub to browse AI models and services.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a 'Discovery App' to the community 'Greenhouse'. The visual should feature Polly the bee acting as an explorer or researcher in a lush, plant-filled greenhouse, discovering something new.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny explorer's hat, looking through a magnifying glass at a glowing digital seed inside a lush greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
